source: CEA Annual Report 2023-24: India average thermal PLF 64.4%, NTPC fleet PLF ~73%. Best-in-class thermal units: 80%+. Renewables: CUF (capacity utilisation factor) 22-27% for solar, 28-38% for wind.
CEA 2023-24: O&M norms ₹14-18 Lakh/MW/year for thermal generation. NTPC FY25 R&M: ~₹10.5 Lakh/MW. Renewables: ₹5-8 Lakh/MW for solar.
NTPC FY25: 5.6%, Adani Green FY25: 4.5%, PowerGrid FY25: 10%. DPE CPSE Survey: energy sector employee cost 5-12%.
NTPC FY25 EBITDA margin: ~24% (regulated return). PowerGrid: ~75% (transmission — very high margin). Adani Green: ~84% (renewables EBITDA). Upstream O&G (ONGC): ~30%.
MoPNG/CEA Annual Report 2023-24: India average AT&C losses ~17-18%. Best state DISCOMs: 10-12%. Worst: 30-40%. UDAY scheme targets <15% nationally.

kpi_name: Renewable Energy % of Total Generation Portfolio
source: CEA Annual Report 2023-24: India total installed RE capacity ~44% of total as of March 2024. Government target: 500 GW RE by 2030. NTPC RE capacity: growing to 60 GW by 2032.
